title: Warm up
content: The slide features three images representing cities: Beijing, Chongqing, and Hangzhou. Each image shows a different view that highlights an aspect of the city.

title: An Evolving Nation
content: This slide emphasizes the theme of a nation evolving through a ride across China. It features images of taxis and iconic cityscapes.

title: Session 1 Match the City Chain!
content: The session focuses on investigating and researching local features, development strategies, and their outcomes. It aims to match the city chain based on these factors.

title: Match the city to its development strategy
content: This slide aligns major Chinese cities with their development strategies. Beijing focuses on technology and tradition integration, Chongqing on sustainable urban development, and Hangzhou on tourism and economic growth.

title: Through the eyes of taxi drivers…
content: The slide describes how each city develops strategies based on local features. It highlights sustainable urban development, tourism and economic growth, and technology and tradition integration.
key_claims: An evolving nation and unique development strategies
Cities develop strategies based on local features
